scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.unlinkSync(f)}catch{} }); if(!process.env.npm_config_user_agent?.startsWith('pnpm/')){ console.warn('Warning: pnpm is recommended for this workspace. npm install may not behave like pnpm.'); }"
scripts.dev: npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm --dir artifacts/towing-birmingham run dev
scripts.dev:api-server: npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server run dev
scripts.dev:mockup-sandbox: npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm --dir artifacts/mockup-sandbox run dev
scripts.dev:towing-birmingham: npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm --dir artifacts/towing-birmingham run dev
scripts.build: npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm run typecheck && npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:api-server: npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server run build
scripts.build:mockup-sandbox: npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm --dir artifacts/mockup-sandbox run build
scripts.build:towing-birmingham: npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm --dir artifacts/towing-birmingham run build
scripts.typecheck: npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm run typecheck:libs && npm exec --package pnpm -- pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
